mnemonics.title: CRL vs OCSP
mnemonics.content: CRL: Certificate Revocation List (Like a phonebook) | OCSP: Online Status Check Protocol (Like a live call)

mnemonics.title: Certificate Lifecycle
mnemonics.content: Generate → Request → Issue → Use → Renew → Revoke → Destroy

visualTips.visualization: Imagine Russian nesting dolls: Root CA → Intermediate CA → End-entity Certificate
Visualize ID card: Issuer=Govt, Subject=You, Validity Dates=Expiry, Public Key=Fingerprint

analogies.analogy: Like passport offices: Root=Country, Intermediate=State, End=Local Office
Like canceling a stolen driver's license - invalidates immediately
